---
title: "Shared atlases and harmonisation pipelines"
root: ".."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page is a **starter**: it reads `data/atlases.json` and `data/harmonization_pipelines.json` and renders them as simple lists.

::: {.callout-note}
Replace the placeholder items in those JSON files with your curated inventory and add citations / licenses.
:::

## Shared atlases

<div id="atlasesList" class="small-muted">Loading…</div>

## Harmonisation pipelines

<div id="pipelinesList" class="small-muted">Loading…</div>

```{=html}
<script>
  window.AD_DIVERSITY_ROOT = "{{< meta root >}}";
</script>
<script src="{{< meta root >}}/assets/js/atlases-page.js"></script>
```
